applicability_notes: Elementwise unary sine. Registered golden function is torch.sin. Frequently appears alongside ttnn.cos on the same input in sinusoidal timestep/positional embeddings (sin(emb), cos(emb) -> concat), and in snake activation chains (x + (1/beta)*sin^2(alpha*x)).

placement_observations.size_descriptor: [1, 1, seq_len, head_dim] RoPE angle table (small, seq_len x head_dim/2 before concat)
placement_observations.source: RoPE precompute call site: sin_half = ttnn.sin(angles); ... ttnn.to_layout(sin, ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, memory_config=ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG)

Diffusion timestep embedding call sites: emb = timestep * self.time_proj_factor; s = ttnn.sin(emb); timestep asserted ttnn.float32; default interleaved memory config (no explicit memory_config passed)
